text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Pearl! I'm throwin' a party pretty soon. You'll
be there, right?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Hehe, do pearls come from oysters? ♪

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
So what kind of party? Shall I perform a dance?
Woo, dance time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh, not necessary. It'll just be a dinner type
thing.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Ah, splendid! What will be on the menu?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, ya know... Fries, nuggets... And everybody
likes rice balls and miso soup!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Miso soup... how delectable. That irreplaceable
flavor... Ahh! It makes my heart race!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hngh! I must shout it to the world! And perform a
dance!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Like I said! You don't need to dance!
